◎简　　介  

　　This made-for-DVD documentary details the work that went into the production of Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl, Disney's blockbuster tale of adventure on the high seas. Action fans are treated to a behind-the-scenes look at the making of this masterpiece of special-effects work, as well as to interviews with the director, the producer, and just about eve...
